items.title: prompts.chat
items.summary: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

items.title: LLMs-from-scratch
items.summary: Implement a ChatGPT-like LLM in PyTorch from scratch, step by step
items.summary_cn: 在PyTorch中从头开始逐步实现类似ChatGPT的LLM
items.comment: 新模型来了，是骡子是马拉出来遛遛，别光看宣传看实测。

items.title: Introspective Coupling: Self-Explanation Training Tracks Behavioral Change Despite Fixed Supervision
items.title_cn: 内省耦合：自我解释培训追踪固定监督下的行为变化
items.summary: When does training language models (LMs) to generate explanations of their predictions yield faithful introspection, rather than superficial imitation? We study LMs trained to explain which features of their inputs influenced their behavior, using models' counterfactual behavior on modified inputs a...
items.summary_cn: 何时训练语言模型（ LM ）以生成对其预测的解释会产生忠实的内省，而不是肤浅的模仿？我们研究了经过培训的LM ，以解释其输入的哪些特征影响了他们的行为，使用模型在修改输入上的反事实行为a...
items.comment: 社区狂欢，实际部署成本你考虑过吗？

items.title: QVal: Cheaply Evaluating Dense Supervision Signals for Long-Horizon LLM Agents
items.title_cn: QVal ：廉价评估长期LLM专员的密集监督信号
items.summary: LLM agents increasingly act over long horizons, where a single trajectory can contain hundreds or thousands of actions. In these settings, outcome-only rewards provide too sparse guidance, failing to inform the model about the goodness of intermediate actions. Dense supervision methods aim to solve ...
items.summary_cn: LLM代理越来越多地在长远的视野中行动，其中单个轨迹可以包含数百或数千个行动。在这些情况下，仅限结果的奖励提供的指导过于稀疏，无法让模型了解中间行动的好处。密集的监督方法旨在解决...
items.comment: AI 模型迭代快得飞起，有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。

items.title: Reinforcement Learning with Metacognitive Feedback Elicits Faithful Uncertainty Expression in LLMs
items.title_cn: 使用元认知反馈的强化学习在LLM中引发忠实的不确定性表达
items.summary: Metacognition is a critical component of intelligence that describes the ability to monitor and regulate one's own cognitive processes. Yet LLMs exhibit systemic deficiencies in key metacognitive faculties: they hallucinate with high confidence, fail to recognize knowledge boundaries, and misreprese...
items.summary_cn: 元认知是智力的一个关键组成部分，它描述了监控和调节自己认知过程的能力。然而，法学硕士在关键元认知能力方面表现出系统性缺陷：他们高度自信地产生幻觉，未能识别知识界限，并误解...
items.comment: AI 领域新动态，保持关注，别被营销号带节奏。

items.title: Meta, like SpaceX, looks to turn excess AI compute into cash
items.title_cn: 像SpaceX一样， Meta希望将多余的人工智能计算转化为现金
items.summary: Meta is developing plans for a cloud infrastructure business, selling access to AI compute power and models. The move would pit it against the big cloud providers like Amazon Web Services, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure.
items.summary_cn: Meta正在制定云基础设施业务计划，出售人工智能计算能力和模型的访问权限。此举将使其与亚马逊网络服务、谷歌云和微软Azure等大型云提供商竞争。
items.comment: 新模型来了，是骡子是马拉出来遛遛，别光看宣传看实测。

items.title: Trump drops restrictions on Anthropic’s Mythos and Fable models
items.title_cn: 特朗普放弃对人类神话和寓言模型的限制
items.summary: The Trump administration's erratic approach to AI policymaking has left companies across the industry with little clarity about what will govern future model releases.
items.summary_cn: 特朗普政府对人工智能政策制定的不稳定态度使整个行业的公司对未来模型发布的内容几乎不清楚。
items.comment: 又是一个「史上最强」，基准测试刷得飞起，实际应用场景待检验。

items.title: Wayve launches $85M employee tender offer at $8.5B valuation
items.title_cn: Wayve以85亿美元的估值推出8500万美元的员工收购要约
items.summary: Wayve’s offering is part of a growing trend of AI startups using employee tenders as a strategic tool to attract and retain talent.
items.summary_cn: Wayve的产品是人工智能初创公司利用员工招标作为吸引和留住人才的战略工具这一日益增长的趋势的一部分。
items.comment: 新模型发布，效果先观望，按 token 计费的玩法，用得起吗？

items.title: Launch HN: Parsewise (YC P25) – Reason Across Documents with an API
items.title_cn: 启动HN ： Parsewise (YC P25) –使用API跨文档的原因
items.summary: Hi all, it’s Greg and Max, founders of Parsewise here Parsewise transforms a bucket of unstructured data into schema compliant data retaining lineage for values resolved across documents. Imagine giving Claude a bunch of files and asking for a CSV or JSON output. If you have tried this, you know both the system limitations (number of files, type of inputs, cost, latency) but also the human-facing challenge of having no way to validate the results quickly. We solve both. We help tech teams simpli
items.summary_cn: 大家好，我是Greg和Max ， Parsewise HERE的创始人Parsewise将一组非结构化数据转换为符合架构的数据，保留了跨文档解析的值的沿袭。想象一下，给Claude一堆文件并要求CSV或JSON输出。如果您已经尝试过，那么您既知道系统限制（文件数量、输入类型、成本、延迟） ，也知道无法快速验证结果的人性化挑战。我们两者都能解决。我们帮助技术团队简化

items.title: Nintendo has raised its employees base salary by 10%
items.title_cn: 任天堂将员工的基本工资提高了10%
